leadText: Supersonic (Japanese: ちょうおんぱ Ultrasound) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I to V 1.2 Generation VI onwards 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Supersonic causes the target to become confused . Supersonic fails if the target is already confused or has Own Tempo . Supersonic is a sound-based move . Generation I to V [ edit | edit source ] Supersonic cannot affect a Pokémon behind a substitute . Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Supersonic can now hit Pokémon even if they are behind a substitute. If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Supersonic, the user's Speed rises one stage. Throat Chop cannot prevent a Pokémon from using Z-Supersonic. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Status Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power — Cooldown 6s Move wind-up time 10 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad A special Normal -type technique. Supersonic sound waves are used to confuse the target. Stad2 A special Normal -type move. Supersonic sound waves are used to confuse the target. G S C Sound waves that cause confusion. R S E Emits bizarre sound waves that may confuse the foe. Colo XD Emits bizarre sound waves that may cause confusion. FR LG The user generates odd sound waves. It may confuse the foe. D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 The user generates odd sound waves from its body. It may confuse the target. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user generates odd sound waves from its body that confuse the target. ZA The user generates peculiar sound waves that will leave targets confused.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts the Confused status on the target, making its attacks and movements erratic. MD T D S Afflicts the targeted enemy with a Confused status condition. A Pokémon with the Confused status has its movements and attacks go astray. B S L てきポケモンを こんらんじょうたいにかえる こんらんじょうたいになると こうげきや わざを へんなほうこうに くりだしてしまう MD GtI It causes the Confused status condition to an enemy. The Confused status impairs its sense of direction. S MD It makes an enemy confused.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Although sound-based moves were not flagged as such until Generation III, Supersonic's move index number falls near other Generation I sound-based moves: Growl , Roar , and Sing .
